name: text-animate
description: Animated text component with customizable reveal effects and timing

registry_item.name: text-animate
registry_item.description: Animated text component with customizable reveal effects and timing

visual_summary: A text-animate component is a UI element that displays text with a dynamic animation. It is commonly used to grab attention or to create a sense of visual interest on a page. It can be used for a wide range of applications such as displaying news headlines, quotes, or other dynamic content.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready text component with the following characteristics:

Name: text-animate
Description: A text-animate component is a UI element that displays text with a dynamic animation. It is commonly used to grab attention or to create a sense of visual interest on a page. It can be used for a wide range of applications such as displaying news headlines, quotes, or other dynamic content.
Style: modern, responsive
Interactions: animated, hover
Tags: text, animation, dynamic-content, attention-grabber

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

import { HTMLMotionProps, motion, useAnimation, useInView } from "motion/react"

  | "shiftInUp"
  | "rollIn"
  | "whipIn"
  | "whipInUp"
  | "calmInUp"

interface Props extends HTMLMotionProps<"div"> {
  text: string
  type?: AnimationType
  delay?: number
  duration?: number
}
